title: Exchanging Gifts 交换礼物
scene: 圣诞节班级里举行交换礼物的活动。

lines.en: Helen, it is time for the gift exchange!
I am so excited! What did you bring?
It is a secret. You will find out when you open it.
lines.zh: 这是个秘密。你打开就知道了。

lines.en: I brought a book. I hope someone likes reading.
lines.zh: 我带了一本书。希望有人喜欢看书。

lines.en: That is a great gift! Let us draw names from the hat.
lines.zh: 很棒的礼物！我们从帽子里抽名字吧。

lines.en: I picked... Tom! This is for you, Tom.
Thank you, Helen! Let me open it.
Do you like it? It is a science book.
lines.zh: 你喜欢吗？是一本科学书。

lines.en: I love science! This is the best gift ever!
lines.zh: 我喜欢科学！这是最好的礼物！

lines.en: I am so glad! Merry Christmas, Tom!
